description: You are a USFS forest inventory technician working on the Chequamegon-Nicolet National Forest in Wisconsin. In the forest_stand_reinventory.gpkg project, identify all stands in the forest_stands layer with a last_inventory_date 5 or more years old relative to 2024-07-01. Update the reinventory_status for these stands to 'OVERDUE', record the years since the last inventory in the field_notes, and set the priority_rank to 1 for stands overdue by more than 7 years or 2 for those overdue by 5-7 years. Additionally, create at least one tree measurement record in the tree_measurements table for each overdue stand, including a realistic tree_tag, species_code appropriate for the forest_type (e.g., 'POTR5' for Aspen/Birch, 'ABBA' for Spruce/Fir, 'ACSA3' for Northern Hardwood, 'PIRE' for Red Pine, 'PIBA2' for Jack Pine), dbh_inches, total_height_ft, and the stand_id. Save all changes.

metadata.data_source: USFS FIA plot locations, Chequamegon-Nicolet National Forest, WI
